input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.9
            TITLE: attachment fasteners - all fasteners attaching scatter shields and guards must be 6 mm or

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.9: Attachment Fasteners - All fasteners attaching scatter shields and guards must be 6 mm or
T.5.2.9 Attachment Fasteners - All fasteners attaching scatter shields and guards must be 6 mm or 
1/4” minimum diameter Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2

final_answer: T.5.2.9 Attachment Fasteners - All fasteners attaching scatter shields and guards must be 6 mm or 1/4” minimum diameter Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
